race.comment: INDI SPRINGS (7) got off the mark with an impressive maiden win when resuming last time out over 1100m at Bathurst. Jake Pracey-Holmes was in the saddle on that occasion and retains the ride. Can go right on with the job now. DINGLE GREY (2) finished 4.5 lengths away in fifth last time out over 1000m at Gosford two-and-a-half weeks ago as $2.45 favourite. Tackles a longer journey this time. Will appreciate the drop in grade and is sure to go well. IMPERIAL STATE (1) missed the placings first-up recently but was not too far from the winner when fourth over 1100m at this track. Races well when second-up and is a likely improver. JAMACRI (9) is racing well and is close to a win, the latest effort a solid second at Bathurst over 1200m. Has her share of talent and is hard to beat in this suitable race.
